response.justification: Although the candidate meets the 15-year minimum experience requirement and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial and open-source initiative, they lack the deep AI/ML expertise and Director-level strategic leadership necessary for this role. Their background is heavily rooted in full-stack implementation rather than enterprise AI platform strategy and high-level customer advisory.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience
Active in knowledge sharing and open-source contributions
concerns: Lacks recognized AI/ML expertise and deep domain knowledge
Seniority falls short of a Director-level individual contributor
No experience advising strategic enterprise customers on AI strategy
